hero.title: Packers & Movers in Punjab
hero.subtitle: Ludhiana to Amritsar, Patiala to Jalandhar — 4,302+ verified movers across 13 cities in Punjab.

intro:
Punjab's thriving agricultural economy, industrial hub in Ludhiana and the Golden Temple city of Amritsar make it a busy relocation market in North India. ShiftIndia connects you with 4,302+ verified movers across Ludhiana, Amritsar, Patiala, Jalandhar, Gurdaspur, Bathinda, Hoshiarpur, Kapurthala, Faridkot and 4 more cities.

From Ludhiana's hosiery and cycle industry relocations to Amritsar's heritage city moves and Patiala's royal neighbourhoods, our KYC-verified vendors know Punjab's wide roads, kachi abaadis and modern residential societies.
whyUs: Punjab's festival season (Gurpurabs, Diwali, Lohri) and agricultural harvest months see peak relocation demand. Our Punjab vendors book well in advance, work efficiently within tight residential society rules, and carry ₹5 lakh damage coverage with GPS tracking on every move.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Punjab?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves within Punjab cities start at ₹3,500. Ludhiana to Amritsar inter-city 2 BHK moves typically cost ₹7,000–₹12,000 including standard packing.

faqs.q: Which cities in Punjab does ShiftIndia cover?
faqs.a: We cover 13 cities: Ludhiana, Amritsar, Patiala, Jalandhar, Gurdaspur, Bathinda, Hoshiarpur, Kapurthala, Faridkot, Firozpur, Batala and more.

faqs.q: Do you handle moves from Punjab to Delhi NCR or Haryana?
faqs.a: Yes. Ludhiana–Delhi, Amritsar–Delhi and Punjab–Chandigarh are among our busiest routes. All include GPS tracking and transit insurance.

faqs.q: Can you move NRI household goods to Punjab from abroad?
faqs.a: Yes. We assist with customs documentation and final-mile delivery for NRI household goods arriving at Amritsar international airport or Delhi port of entry.
